spring-boot-rest-services/pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Java version property from 1.8 to 17 to target the new JDK.
spring-boot-rest-services/pom.xml.why_exists: The project must compile and run on Java 17; keeping 1.8 may cause build failures or incorrect bytecode generation depending on the build plugin configuration.

spring-boot-rest-services/pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade the Spring Boot parent version from 1.4.0.RELEASE to 3.3.13.
spring-boot-rest-services/pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 1.4 is incompatible with Java 17 and Spring Framework 6; the upgrade is required to run on the target JDK.

spring-boot-rest-services/pom.xml.general_idea: Add explicit dependency management for spring-data-rest-hal-browser.

spring-boot-rest-services/src/main/java/.general_idea: Migrate JPA entity annotations from javax.persistence to jakarta.persistence namespace.
spring-boot-rest-services/src/main/java/.why_exists: javax.persistence package is removed in Jakarta EE 9+ (Spring Boot 3), causing compile errors for missing classes.

spring-boot-rest-services/src/main/java/.general_idea: Migrate JPA entity annotations from javax.persistence to jakarta.persistence namespace.
spring-boot-rest-services/src/main/java/.why_exists: javax.persistence package is removed in Jakarta EE 9+ (Spring Boot 3), causing compile errors for missing classes.

spring-boot-rest-services/src/main/java/.general_idea: Migrate JPA entity annotations from javax.persistence to jakarta.persistence namespace.
spring-boot-rest-services/src/main/java/.why_exists: javax.persistence package is removed in Jakarta EE 9+ (Spring Boot 3), causing compile errors for missing classes.

spring-boot-rest-services/src/main/java/.general_idea: Migrate JPA entity annotations from javax.persistence to jakarta.persistence namespace.
spring-boot-rest-services/src/main/java/.why_exists: javax.persistence package is removed in Jakarta EE 9+ (Spring Boot 3), causing compile errors for missing classes.

spring-boot-rest-services/src/main/java/.general_idea: Replace String.format with String.formatted for modern string interpolation syntax.
spring-boot-rest-services/src/main/java/.before:
return String.format(
			"Course [id=%s, name=%s, description=%s, steps=%s]", id, name,

spring-boot-rest-services/src/main/java/.general_idea: Replace String.format with String.formatted for modern string interpolation.
spring-boot-rest-services/src/main/java/.before:
return String.format(
			"Student [id=%s, name=%s, description=%s, courses=%s]", id,

spring-boot-rest-services/src/main/java/.general_idea: Replace deprecated WebSecurityConfigurerAdapter with lambda DSL configuration required by Spring Security 6.
spring-boot-rest-services/src/main/java/.why_exists: WebSecurityConfigurerAdapter is removed in Spring Security 6, causing compilation errors if extended.

spring-boot-rest-services/src/main/java/.general_idea: Update HttpSecurity configuration to use lambda DSL and requestMatchers instead of deprecated antMatchers.
spring-boot-rest-services/src/main/java/.why_exists: antMatchers is removed in Spring Security 6, causing compilation errors; fluent API methods like .and() are removed.

spring-boot-rest-services/src/main/java/.general_idea: Add import for Customizer.withDefaults required by new Spring Security 6 configuration style.
spring-boot-rest-services/src/main/java/.why_exists: withDefaults is used in the new configuration but was not imported, causing compilation error.

spring-boot-rest-services/src/test/java/.general_idea: Migrate JUnit 4 assertions to JUnit 5 Jupiter assertions.
spring-boot-rest-services/src/test/java/.why_exists: JUnit 4 classes are not part of the default JUnit 5 platform; tests will fail to compile or run if JUnit 4 dependencies are removed.

spring-boot-rest-services/src/test/java/.general_idea: Migrate JUnit 4 lifecycle annotations to JUnit 5 Jupiter annotations.
spring-boot-rest-services/src/test/java/.why_exists: JUnit 4 annotations are ignored by the JUnit 5 engine; lifecycle methods will not execute.

spring-boot-rest-services/src/test/java/.general_idea: Migrate JUnit 4 Test annotation to JUnit 5 Jupiter Test annotation.
spring-boot-rest-services/src/test/java/.why_exists: JUnit 4 @Test is not recognized by JUnit 5 engine; tests will not be discovered or executed.

spring-boot-rest-services/src/test/java/.general_idea: Remove JUnit 4 runner configuration in favor of JUnit 5 platform.
spring-boot-rest-services/src/test/java/.why_exists: JUnit 5 does not use @RunWith; keeping it is unnecessary and may cause confusion or conflicts if mixed with vintage engine.

spring-boot-rest-services/src/test/java/.general_idea: Update Spring Boot test annotation for LocalServerPort to match Spring Boot 3 package structure.
spring-boot-rest-services/src/test/java/.why_exists: The class org.springframework.boot.context.embedded.LocalServerPort was removed in Spring Boot 3; compilation fails without updating to the new package.

spring-boot-rest-services/src/test/java/.general_idea: Migrate JUnit 4 assertions to JUnit 5 Jupiter assertions.
Migrate JUnit 4 @Test annotation to JUnit 5 Jupiter @Test annotation.
Remove JUnit 4 runner dependency as JUnit 5 uses a different execution model.
Remove Spring JUnit 4 runner class import.
Remove JUnit 4 @RunWith annotation which is not supported in JUnit 5.
